response.justification: Bogdan is a strong staff-level generalist with roughly 15 years of production engineering, current agentic-tooling exposure at Stripe (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks), and a teaching/workshop background that fits the customer-facing side of a forward-deployed role. However, he falls well short of the core requirement of 8+ years building AI-driven solutions — his GenAI work spans roughly one year — and the resume shows no vector database, RAG, LLM evaluation, or Python experience, all central to this position.
strengths: 15+ years of production full-stack engineering, currently at staff level at Stripe
Hands-on experience with MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure
Proven mentoring and workshop/teaching track record suited to customer-facing technical leadership
concerns: Only ~1 year of AI/GenAI work versus the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions
No demonstrated vector database, RAG architecture, or LLM evaluation/observability experience
Python is absent from his skill set; strengths are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang

key_factors.factor: Current MCP and agentic tooling work at Stripe
No RAG or vector database background
